---
title: "Wilcoxon (Mann–Whitney U) on exponential data — Compare p-value approximation methods"
date: "Compiled at `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', tz = 'UTC')` UTC"
output:
  github_document: default
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
params:
  name: "04_p_approx_methods" # change if you rename file
---

```{r here, message=FALSE}
here::i_am(paste0(params$name, ".Rmd"), uuid = "8c251fa3-8abd-4ca9-bec7-dd848ebb5a2d")
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  dev = c("png", "cairo_pdf"),
  fig.ext = c("png", "pdf"),
  fig.width = 11, 
  fig.height = 6, 
  dpi = 200,
  fig.path = paste0('figures/', params, "/expl_wilcox_methods_"),
  message = FALSE, 
  warning = FALSE,
  echo = FALSE)
```

## Packages & paths

```{r packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(conflicted)

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(pheatmap)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(future)
library(future.apply)
library(kableExtra)
library(furrr)
library(progressr)
library(patchwork)
library(digest) # For seed stream
library(scales)

# For permApprox:
library(fdrtool)
library(fitdistrplus)
library(goftest)
library(limma)

conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select, dplyr::filter)
```

```{r directories}
# create or *empty* the target directory, used to write this file's data: 
#projthis::proj_create_dir_target(params$name, clean = TRUE)

# function to get path to target directory: path_target("sample.csv")
path_target <- projthis::proj_path_target(params$name)

# function to get path to previous data: path_source("00-import", "sample.csv")
path_source <- projthis::proj_path_source(params$name)
```

## Load permApprox functions (+ SLLS)

```{r permapprox-load}
proj_path <- rprojroot::find_root(rprojroot::has_file("README.md"))

# permApprox core
permApprox_path <- file.path(proj_path, "functions/permApprox_eps_fct/R")
permApprox_functions <- list.files(permApprox_path, pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE)
invisible(sapply(permApprox_functions, source))

# ε-rule (SLLS) used by permApprox constrained fits
eps_rule_path <- file.path(proj_path, "functions/permApprox_eps_fct/slls_eps_rule.R")
source(eps_rule_path)  # provides eps_slls()
```

## Global design 

```{r design}
cores <- 8

n_tests <- 1000
n_per_group_vec <- c(50, 100, 250, 500, 750, 1000)
B <- 1000

# Effects: mean1 = 1, mean2 = 1 + delta
effect_blocks <- c(0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2)
delta_vec <- rep(effect_blocks, each = n_tests / length(effect_blocks))
delta_vec <- factor(delta_vec, levels = effect_blocks)
```

## Methods to compare

```{r registry}
methods_registry <- list(
  gamma = list(
    label  = "Gamma",
    engine = "gamma",
    params = list(
      gamma_ctrl = make_gamma_ctrl(include_obs = FALSE, 
                                   gof_test="none", 
                                   gof_alpha=0.05)
    )
  ),
  gpd_knijnen = list(
    label  = "GPD (Knijnen)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 1,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "MLE1D",
        tol           = 1e-10,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "unconstrained",
        thresh_method = "ftr",
        exceed0       = 250,
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10,
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),
  gpd_knijnen_pow3 = list(
    label  = "GPD (Knijnen, pow3)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 3,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "MLE1D",
        tol           = 1e-10,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "unconstrained",
        thresh_method = "ftr",
        exceed0       = 250,
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10,
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),
  gpd_winkler_inclobs = list(
    label  = "GPD (Winkler, +obs)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 1,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "MLE1D",
        tol           = 1e-10,
        include_obs   = TRUE,
        constraint    = "unconstrained",
        thresh_method = "ftr",
        exceed0       = 0.25,  # 0.25*B start
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10,
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),
  gpd_papprox_support = list(
    label  = "GPD (pApprox, s>obs)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 1,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "LME",
        tol           = 1e-7,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "support_at_obs",
        thresh_method = "rob_ftr",
        exceed0       = 0.25,      # 25% exceedances
        exceed0_min   = 250,       # at least 250
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10,
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  )
)
```

## Engines (compact)

```{r engines}
path_data <- path_source("01_test_eps_rule")

# Wilcoxon reference loader
.load_base <- function(n) {
  obs  <- readRDS(paste0(path_data, "/obs_U_stats_n",  n, "_B1000.rds"))
  perm <- readRDS(paste0(path_data, "/perm_U_stats_n", n, "_B1000.rds"))
  pwcx <- readRDS(paste0(path_data, "/pval_wilcox_n", n, "_B1000.rds"))
  list(obs = obs, perm = perm, p_wilcox = pwcx)
}

.engine_gamma <- function(obs, perm, n, def) {
  compute_p_values(
    obs_stats     = (obs/10), 
    perm_stats    = (perm/10),# Gamma fit fails if test statistics are too large
    alternative   = "two_sided",
    null_center   = "mean",
    method        = "gamma",
    fit_thresh    = 0.1,
    gamma_ctrl    = def$params$gamma_ctrl,
    adjust_method = "none"
  )$p_unadjusted
}

.engine_gpd <- function(obs, perm, n, def) {
  compute_p_values(
    obs_stats     = obs,
    perm_stats    = perm,
    eps_fct       = eps_slls_tmax,      # for constraints (no-op for unconstrained)
    sampsize      = n,
    alternative   = "two_sided",
    null_center   = "mean",
    method        = "gpd",
    fit_thresh    = 0.1,
    power         = def$params$power,
    gpd_ctrl      = def$params$gpd_ctrl,
    adjust_method = "none"
  )$p_unadjusted
}

run_methods_for_n <- function(n) {
  base <- .load_base(n)
  tibble(
    idx         = seq_along(base$obs),
    n_per_group = n,
    effect_size = delta_vec,
    obs_stats   = base$obs,
    p_wilcox    = base$p_wilcox
  ) %>% {
    df <- .
    meth_list <- imap(methods_registry, function(def, key) {
      pvals <- switch(def$engine,
        gamma = .engine_gamma(df$obs_stats, base$perm, n, def),
        gpd   = .engine_gpd(df$obs_stats, base$perm, n, def),
        stop("Unknown engine")
      )
      tibble(method = def$label, p_method = pvals)
    })
    bind_rows(meth_list, .id = "method_key") %>%
      select(-method_key) %>%
      bind_cols(df[rep(1:nrow(df), times = length(meth_list)), ]) %>%
      relocate(method, .before = p_method)
  }
}
```

## Compute and combine

```{r compute_all}
out_dir <- file.path(path_target())
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

method_keys <- names(methods_registry)

# Per-n cache files
out_file_n <- function(n) file.path(out_dir, paste0("pvals_methods_n", 
                                                    n, "_B1000.rds"))

handlers("txtprogressbar")
plan(multisession, workers = cores)

with_progress({
  p <- progressr::progressor(along = n_per_group_vec)
  res_paths <- future_map(n_per_group_vec, function(n) {
    fn <- out_file_n(n)
    if (!file.exists(fn)) {
      res_n <- run_methods_for_n(n)
      saveRDS(res_n, fn)
    }
    p()
    fn
  })
})

plan(sequential)

results_all <- map_dfr(n_per_group_vec, ~ readRDS(out_file_n(.x)))
```

## Rename methods

```{r}
df_n <- results_all %>%
  mutate(method = dplyr::recode(
    method,
    "Gamma"                = "Gamma",
    "GPD (Knijnen)"        = "GPD (Knijnenburg)",
    "GPD (Knijnen, pow3)"  = "GPD (Knijnenburg,pow3)",
    "GPD (Winkler, +obs)"  = "GPD (Winkler,+obs)",
    "GPD (pApprox, s>obs)" = "GPD (permApprox)"
  ))

method_order <- c(
  "Gamma",
  "GPD (Knijnenburg)",
  "GPD (Knijnenburg,pow3)",
  "GPD (Winkler,+obs)",
  "GPD (permApprox)"
)

df_n <- df_n %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_order))
```


## Plot helper (log breaks) and plotter

```{r plot function}
# Helper for breaks
.compute_log_breaks <- function(ymin, 
                                ymax, 
                                min_ticks = 5, 
                                breaks_incl = NULL) {
  ymin <- max(ymin, .Machine$double.xmin); ymax <- min(max(ymin, ymax), 1)
  e_min <- floor(log10(ymin)); e_max <- min(0, ceiling(log10(ymax)))
  try_steps <- if (abs(e_min) <= 100) c(20,10,5) else 50
  brks <- NULL
  for (s in try_steps) {
    start_exp <- -s * ceiling(abs(e_min) / s)
    exps <- seq(from = start_exp, to = -s, by = s)
    exps <- exps[exps >= e_min & exps <= e_max]
    cand <- 10^exps; cand <- cand[cand >= ymin & cand <= ymax]
    if (!is.null(breaks_incl)) {
      add <- breaks_incl[breaks_incl > 0 & breaks_incl <= 1]
      cand <- sort(unique(c(cand, add))); cand <- cand[cand >= ymin & cand <= ymax]
    }
    if (length(cand) >= min_ticks) { brks <- cand; break }
    brks <- cand
  }
  labs <- paste0("1e", formatC(log10(brks), format="f",
                               digits = if (any(abs(log10(brks)-round(log10(brks)))>1e-9)) 1 else 0))
  list(breaks = brks, labels = labs)
}

#-------------------------------------------------
# Plot function
plot_methods <- function(df, n, 
                         min_ticks = 5, 
                         breaks_incl = 1e-3, 
                         nrow = 2,
                         legend_position = "right",
                         title = NULL) {
  # Replace zero p-values with floor
  min_nonzero <- suppressWarnings(
    min(c(df$p_wilcox[df$p_wilcox > 0], df$p_method[df$p_method > 0]), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
  zero_repl <- if (is.finite(min_nonzero) && min_nonzero > 0) min_nonzero / 100 else 1e-300

  dfp <- df %>%
    mutate(
      p_ref_plot = ifelse(p_wilcox == 0, zero_repl, p_wilcox),
      p_met_plot = ifelse(p_method == 0, zero_repl, p_method)
    )

  # Range and breaks
  y_min <- suppressWarnings(min(c(dfp$p_ref_plot, dfp$p_met_plot), na.rm = TRUE))
  y_max <- suppressWarnings(max(c(dfp$p_ref_plot, dfp$p_met_plot), na.rm = TRUE))
  br_base <- .compute_log_breaks(y_min, y_max, min_ticks = min_ticks, breaks_incl = breaks_incl)
  brks <- sort(unique(c(zero_repl, br_base$breaks)))
  # --- compute labels ---
  labs <- ifelse(
    brks == zero_repl, 
    "0",
    gsub("\\.0$", "", 
         paste0("1e", 
                formatC(log10(brks), format = "f",
                        digits = if (any(abs(log10(brks) - round(log10(brks))) > 1e-9)) 1 else 0)))
  )
  
  ggplot(dfp, aes(x = obs_stats)) +
    # --- Wilcoxon reference ---
    geom_point(aes(y = p_ref_plot, shape = "Wilcoxon"),
               color = "black", size = 2, stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.55) +
    # --- GPD methods ---
    geom_point(aes(y = p_met_plot, shape = "GPD approx", color = effect_size),
               size = 1.6, alpha = 0.6) +
    facet_wrap(~ method, nrow = nrow) +
    scale_y_log10(
      breaks = brks, labels = labs, minor_breaks = NULL,
      limits = c(zero_repl, 1)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      name = "p-value type:",
      values = c("Wilcoxon" = 1, "GPD approx" = 16)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "Effect size:",
      values = c("0"="gold","0.5"="#ffb347","1"="#ff8c00","1.5"="#e55b00","2"="red")
    ) +
    labs(
      # title = ifelse(!is.null(title), title, 
      #                paste0("p-value approximations vs. Wilcoxon U (n = ", 
      #                       n, ", B = ", B, ")")),
      x = expression(U[obs]),
      y = expression(p)
    ) +
    guides(
      shape = guide_legend(order = 1),
      color = guide_legend(order = 2)
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 16),
      legend.position = legend_position
    ) +
    guides(
    color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3)),
    fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3)),
    shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3)))
}
```

## Plots

### n = 50

```{r pvals_n50, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 4.5, dpi = 200}
n_val <- 50
p <- df_n %>% 
  filter(n_per_group == n_val) %>%
  filter(method %in% c("Gamma", "GPD (Knijnenburg)", "GPD (Knijnenburg,pow3)", 
                       "GPD (permApprox)", "GPD (Winkler,+obs)")) %>%
  plot_methods(n = n_val, title = "", nrow = 1, legend_position = "bottom")
print(p)
```


### n = 100

```{r pvals_n100, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 4.5, dpi = 200}
n_val <- 100
p <- df_n %>% 
  filter(n_per_group == n_val) %>%
  filter(method %in% c("Gamma", "GPD (Knijnenburg)", "GPD (Knijnenburg,pow3)", 
                       "GPD (permApprox)", "GPD (Winkler,+obs)")) %>%
  plot_methods(n = n_val, title = "", nrow = 1, legend_position = "bottom")
print(p)
```

### n = 250

```{r pvals_n250, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 4.5, dpi = 200}
n_val <- 250
p <- df_n %>% 
  filter(n_per_group == n_val) %>%
  filter(method %in% c("Gamma", "GPD (Knijnenburg)", "GPD (Knijnenburg,pow3)", 
                       "GPD (permApprox)", "GPD (Winkler,+obs)")) %>%
  plot_methods(n = n_val, title = "", nrow = 1, legend_position = "bottom")
print(p)
```

### n = 500

```{r pvals_n500, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 4.5, dpi = 200}
n_val <- 500
p <- df_n %>% 
  filter(n_per_group == n_val) %>%
  filter(method %in% c("Gamma", "GPD (Knijnenburg)", "GPD (Knijnenburg,pow3)", 
                       "GPD (permApprox)", "GPD (Winkler,+obs)")) %>%
  plot_methods(n = n_val, title = "", nrow = 1, legend_position = "bottom")
print(p)
```

### n = 1000

```{r pvals_n1000, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 4.5, dpi = 200}
n_val <- 1000
p <- df_n %>% 
  filter(n_per_group == n_val) %>%
  filter(method %in% c("Gamma", "GPD (Knijnenburg)", "GPD (Knijnenburg,pow3)", 
                       "GPD (permApprox)", "GPD (Winkler,+obs)")) %>%
  plot_methods(n = n_val, title = "", nrow = 1, legend_position = "bottom")
print(p)
```
